title: Basic JavaScript Class Inheritance
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Class Inheritance. Focus on implementing extends keyword correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Class Inheritance
description: Create a function that uses extends keyword and super() constructor call together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Class Inheritance Project
description: Build a small application that applies extends keyword, super() constructor call, Method overriding in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Class Inheritance
description: The following code has bugs related to extends keyword. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Class Inheritance
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with extends keyword and super() constructor call.
